case_title: MARMOLEJO, CRISTINA vs. SHAHIJANIAN, SARO, AN INDIVIDUAL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARMOLEJO, CRISTINA AS TO DEFENDANT SHAHIJANIAN, SARO AN INDIVIDUAL & DBA SOUTH CITY SHELL SERVICE
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
